reason: Check frontend ownership and required validation commands.
Check Settings and Translation view behavior, Chinese UI copy, and shadcn usage.
Check Rust/TypeScript AppSettings parity and translation type placement.
Check that provider HTTP stays in frontend and no incomplete Tauri command chain is introduced.
Check tests, build, minimal diffs, and secret handling.
Check Rust changes remain limited to the settings persistence boundary.
Check Rust tests, untrusted settings normalization, and secret-safe diagnostics.
Check compatibility against the traced legacy flow and identified risks.
Check adapter requests and model discovery against official contracts.
